suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-3 launch status and EIP-8037 readiness
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 was blocked in ACDE #232 due to clients not being ready for EIP-8037. ACDE #233 targeted 'early next week' launch (late March). Critical to confirm whether the devnet launched successfully and if the EIP-8037 implementation complexity issues (gas accounting alignment with 7928/7778, refund logic, state gas reservoir) were resolved.

EIP-8070 was CFI'd in ACDE #233 with an explicit action item for all client teams to review the proposal and assess complexity. Geth has a prototype complete. This is a recent CFI requiring synchronous discussion of implementation feasibility across clients.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing progress: EIP-7976 and EIP-7904 readiness for devnet testing
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #233 discussed targeting 60 Mgas/s baseline with ~18 operations needing repricing. EIP-7976 (call data gas to 64) enables 670M gas blocks, and EIP-7904 compute repricing affects 6.8M transactions. Both are critical for Glamsterdam scope and need devnet inclusion planning. Repricing breakout was scheduled for March 19 to resolve 8037/7928 alignment—status update needed.

EIP-8141 was CFI'd as a non-headliner for Hegotá in ACDE #233. Frame tx mempool doc published with Strategy 2 recommended, and native batching with atomic revert was highlighted as a key feature. Next step is determining devnet testing approach and client implementation timelines.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet-0 relaunch and PTSC changes integration
suggestions.rationale: ePBS DevNet-0 was broken by withdrawals in ACDE #233, with a relaunch planned incorporating PTSC changes. FOCIL was CFI'd for Hegotá, making ePBS testing critical path. Status update on relaunch and validator/builder functionality needed.

suggestions.topic: Scheme transactions (EIP-8XXX) as alternative AA proposal
suggestions.rationale: Scheme transactions were proposed in ACDE #233 as a simpler AA alternative to Frame transactions. Given strong community support for AA and Hegotá's non-headliner AA theme, this proposal warrants initial discussion and comparison with EIP-8141.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing stakeholder outreach survey results
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #233 included an action item to review gas repricing outreach survey results and stakeholder feedback. While important for context, this is informational and doesn't require urgent synchronous discussion unless blocking decisions emerge.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá fork scope finalization and devnet timeline
suggestions.rationale: With no EL headliner selected and FOCIL CFI'd on the CL side, Hegotá's scope is taking shape around AA (EIP-8141), repricing (7976, 7904, 8037), and P2P updates (ETH/70, ETH/71). A consolidated view of confirmed scope and remaining open questions would help align teams, but this is more informational than blocking.
